data.description:
## Context / Problem
Discovered from 80af: `rebar verify-commit-ticket` fails 'ticket store not found' in a fresh linked worktree because it is a PURE INTERCEPT (_cli/__init__.py:438) dispatched before the arms that call the centralized `ensure_initialized`, and it does not self-manage init — yet it resolves ids against the store. The mount step is replicated per dispatch-arm and skipped entirely by the intercepts, so the "command forgot to mount the store" bug is structurally possible.

## Design (agreed)
The MOUNT half of init (`ensure_initialized(init_only=True)` → `_create_tracker`: symlink a worktree to the main repo store / attach to an existing tickets branch; already a no-op under REBAR_TRACKER_DIR override) should run at ONE central CLI choke point, BEFORE both the pure intercepts and the set-based dispatch, for every store-touching command. The RECONVERGE half (`reads.ensure_fresh`) is already shared across CLI/library/MCP via the _reads facade and stays in the leaves (init_only vs full differ ONLY by reconverge). Per the tolerance we agreed: the per-arm `ensure_initialized` calls may remain (idempotent re-mount is cheap and non-fatal); the central gate's job is to guarantee no command skips mount. Commands that must NOT auto-mount (policy=none): `init` (is init), `scratch` (fs-only), `explain` (guides, no store), and pure no-store reads.

Scope: CLI surface only. Library (`import rebar`) and MCP intentionally do NOT auto-mount (they require explicit init_repo / assume a mounted store; embedders inject a tracker which no-ops the gate) — unchanged here.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `rebar verify-commit-ticket` in a fresh linked worktree (no .tickets-tracker) auto-mounts (symlink to main repo store) and resolves the id, instead of 'ticket store not found' — regression test.
- [ ] The mount runs at a single central CLI gate covering the pure intercepts; no store-touching command can skip it.
- [ ] `explain` (and init/scratch) are NOT force-mounted — they keep working with no store — guard test.
- [ ] REBAR_TRACKER_DIR override still short-circuits the gate (tests/embedding unaffected).
- [ ] make lint && make typecheck && make test green; docs/cli-reference regenerated if the CLI surface changed.
data.title: Centralize CLI store-mount so no command (incl. pure intercepts like verify-commit-ticket) can skip it
